name: Dream Cicada
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>夢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆめ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>蝉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぜみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>スイミンミン
desc: If you control an Attack Position Insect monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Dream Cicada" once per turn this way. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 monster on the field; change its battle position. You can only use this effect of "Dream Cicada" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control an Attack Position Insect monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Dream Cicada" once per turn this way. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 monster on the field; change its battle position. You can only use this effect of "Dream Cicada" once per turn.
eff: If you control an Attack Position Insect monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Dream Cicada" once per turn this way. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 monster on the field; change its battle position. You can only use this effect of "Dream Cicada" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
